rationale: Both reviews correctly flag the uncommented `change` (lines 170-173) and fragile `simpa`/`let u` pattern (lines 47-55) as departures from proof-quality norms; acting on either produces equivalent improvements via the same targeted fixes (use `includeRight_apply`, stabilize the convolution step). Review 2's extra claims (map_id/map_comp `ext; induction; simp`, final `simp` chain) target common and accepted Lean patterns whose refactoring would not materially improve the PR per the rubric criteria.
